```js
const reallyLongVariableName = someFunction(withArgumentOne, withArgumentTwo, withArgumentThree, withArgumentFour, withArgumentFive, withArgumentSix, withArgumentSeven);
export default reallyLongVariableName.map((x) => x.transformInSomeVeryDescriptiveAndVerboseManner()).filter(Boolean).join(', ');
```

# SQL

```sql
SELECT id, name, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM events
WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
GROUP BY id, name
ORDER BY n DESC
LIMIT 10;
```

# Inline Math

Einstein: $E = mc^2$, Euler: $e^{i\pi}+1=0$, and the quadratic formula $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$.

# Block Math

$$\int_0^{\infty} e^{-x^2}\,dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}$$

# Multiple Block Math

$$a^2 + b^2 = c^2$$

$$\sum_{k=1}^{n} k = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$

$$\lim_{x \to 0} \frac{\sin x}{x} = 1$$

# Long Equation

$$f(x) = a_0 + \sum_{n=1}^{\infty}\left(a_n \cos\frac{n\pi x}{L} + b_n \sin\frac{n\pi x}{L}\right)$$

# Matrix

$$\begin{bmatrix} a & b & c \\ d & e & f \\ g & h & i \end{bmatrix} \begin{bmatrix} x \\ y \\ z \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} p \\ q \\ r \end{bmatrix}$$

# Math + Text + List

The series converges:

$$\sum_{n=0}^{\infty} \frac{1}{2^n} = 2$$

- Ratio test applies
- Geometric with $r = 1/2$
- Bounded above

# Aligned Equations

$$\begin{aligned} (a+b)^2 &= a^2 + 2ab + b^2 \\ (a-b)^2 &= a^2 - 2ab + b^2 \end{aligned}$$

# Fraction Heavy

$$\frac{\frac{1}{a} + \frac{1}{b}}{\frac{1}{c} - \frac{1}{d}} = \frac{cd(a+b)}{ab(d-c)}$$

# Greek + Symbols

$$\alpha\beta\gamma\delta\epsilon\zeta\eta\theta\iota\kappa\lambda\mu\nu\xi\pi\rho\sigma\tau\phi\chi\psi\omega \quad \nabla \cdot \vec{E} = \frac{\rho}{\epsilon_0}$$

# Broken Math (graceful)

$$\frac{\unknowncommand{x}}{\notreal}$$

An invalid TeX expression should degrade, not crash the slide.

# Mermaid Flowchart LR

```mermaid
graph LR
  A[Markdown] --> B[Parser]
  B --> C[Slides]
  C --> D[Preview]
  C --> E[Audience]
  E -.edits.-> A
```

# Mermaid Flowchart TD

```mermaid
graph TD
  Start --> Decide{Fits?}
  Decide -->|Yes| Render
  Decide -->|No| PickLayout
  PickLayout --> Render
  Render --> Done
```

# Mermaid Sequence

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Editor
  participant Channel
  participant Audience
  Editor->>Channel: edit
  Channel->>Audience: patch
  Audience-->>Editor: ack
```

# Mermaid Class

```mermaid
classDiagram
  class Deck {
    +slides
    +config
    +parse()
  }
  class Slide {
    +layout
    +html
  }
  Deck --> Slide
```

# Mermaid State

```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Editing
  Editing --> Presenting: Cmd+P
  Presenting --> Editing: Esc
  Presenting --> [*]
```

# Mermaid Pie

```mermaid
pie title Theme usage
  "Mocha" : 38
  "Tokyo" : 22
  "Dracula" : 18
  "Other" : 22
```

# Mermaid Gantt

```mermaid
gantt
  title Roadmap
  dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
  section Core
  Parser :a1, 2024-01-01, 30d
  Layouts :a2, after a1, 20d
  section Polish
  Themes :2024-03-01, 25d
```

# Mermaid Large Graph

```mermaid
graph TD
  N0 --> N1
  N1 --> N2
  N2 --> N3
  N3 --> N4
  N4 --> N5
  N5 --> N6
  N6 --> N7
  N7 --> N8
  N8 --> N9
  N9 --> N10
  N10 --> N11
  N11 --> N12
  N6 --> N12
  N3 --> N9
```

# Mermaid Wide Graph

```mermaid
graph LR
  A --> B --> C --> D --> E --> F --> G --> H --> I --> J
```

# Mermaid ER

```mermaid
erDiagram
  DECK ||--o{ SLIDE : contains
  SLIDE ||--o{ BLOCK : has
  DECK { string title }
  SLIDE { string layout }
```

# Mermaid + Text

The pipeline:

```mermaid
graph LR
  In --> Out
```

```mermaid
  A -->
  this is not valid mermaid syntax @@@
```

# Compare

:::compare
## Before
- single CRUD table
- no audit trail
- one writer wins

## After
- append-only events
- complete audit trail
- history is truth
:::

# CJK Dense

日本語のテキスト。これはスライドが日本語の文字を正しくレンダリングできることを確認するためのテストです。中文文本用于测试。한국어 텍스트도 포함됩니다.

# Special Characters

```
\ / | < > & " ' ` ~ ! @ # $ % ^ * ( ) _ + = { } [ ] : ; , . ?
```

And inline: <not a tag> & ``backtick`` handling.
